name: Cloudflare Monorepo
description: Turborepo + Cloudflare Workers + Pages + D1 + KV

nextjs-dashboard.label: Next.js Dashboard (Cloudflare Workers)
nextjs-dashboard.description: Adds apps/dashboard — a Next.js 15 app on Cloudflare Workers via OpenNext, with service binding to the worker

agentic-skills.label: Agentic Skills (Claude Code)
agentic-skills.description: Installs Claude Code agent skills for Cloudflare Workers, Durable Objects, shadcn/ui, TanStack, and more via the skills CLI
postCreateCommands: npx -y skills add https://github.com/cloudflare/skills --skill wrangler --agent claude-code --yes
npx -y skills add https://github.com/cloudflare/skills --skill durable-objects --agent claude-code --yes
npx -y skills add https://github.com/cloudflare/skills --skill workers-best-practices --agent claude-code --yes

durable-object-websocket.label: Durable Object WebSocket
durable-object-websocket.description: Adds a WebSocket hibernation server Durable Object to the worker with a /websocket endpoint
